task_completion.description: Configure the CCD Region of Interest (ROI) size to 1024x1024.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the Ekos Capture module or INDI Control Panel showing 'Width' and 'Height' values set to exactly 1024.

task_completion.description: Configure the CCD ROI offsets to perfectly center the 1024x1024 region on the 4096x4096 sensor.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the Ekos Capture module or INDI Control Panel showing 'X' (or X-offset) and 'Y' (or Y-offset) values set to exactly 1536.

task_completion.description: Execute observations of the specified Young Stellar Object (YSO) targets.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the Ekos sequence queue, scheduler, or FITS viewer showing active or completed observations for NGC 2261, NGC 1555, or McNeil's Nebula.

task_completion.description: Capture a final sky context image.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a captured image displayed in the FITS viewer or a completed capture action in the Ekos capture module distinct from the main target sequence.

task_completion.description: Restore the CCD to full-frame mode.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the Ekos Capture module or INDI Control Panel showing 'Width' and 'Height' values restored to 4096.

integrity.description: The agent used the KStars/Ekos GUI to configure the camera and capture images.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the KStars/Ekos interface open and being interacted with, rather than just terminal windows running backend scripts to fake the FITS files.

integrity.description: The agent actually captured images using the simulated CCD.
integrity.visual_evidence: The FITS viewer or Ekos capture module should display actual astronomical image data or capture progress bars, not just text files or empty frames.

integrity.description: The ROI and full-frame settings are genuinely applied in the camera settings.
integrity.visual_evidence: The X/Y offsets and Width/Height values should be visible in the actual INDI/Ekos camera configuration panels, not just typed into a notepad or terminal echo.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The observing plan requires capturing images of NGC 2261, NGC 1555, and McNeil's Nebula. The CCD must be configured to a perfectly centered 1024x1024 Region of Interest (ROI). Since the full frame is 4096x4096, the correct X and Y offsets for the ROI are exactly 1536 ((4096 - 1024) / 2). Finally, the CCD must be restored to its full-frame resolution of 4096x4096.
